positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical, celestial forest scene dominated by bioluminescent flora and fauna. The central element is a massive, ornate, stylized moon phase portal opening onto a field of glowing crystalline flowers and deep violet, midnight-blue mist. Silhouette details must be clean and crisp, featuring elegant, abstract creatures (like stylized moths and winged deer) navigating the glowing path. Use a high-contrast, graphic novel aesthetic combined with vibrant, neon synthwave colors: deep indigo, electric teal, magenta, and gold accents. The composition must be centered and suitable for repetitive, scalable printing, ensuring clean outlines and minimal gradients that could bleed. Vector illustration quality, flat graphic art, intricate detail, 8K, designed for t-shirt print.
